content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "XOR on Segment". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/242/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the size of the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers. The third line contains an integer q, which is the number of queries. The next q lines contain two space-separated integers, l and r, representing the segment [l, r].
content.outputFormat: For each query, print the XOR of all elements in the segment [l, r].

solution.approach: Use prefix XOR sum to calculate the XOR of any segment in O(1) time.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
prefix = [0] * (n + 1)
for i in range(n):
    prefix[i + 1] = prefix[i] ^ arr[i]
q = int(input())
for _ in range(q):
    l, r = map(int, input().split())
    print(prefix[r] ^ prefix[l - 1])
